props.title: Auth Login Sequence
props.description: Client login, auth branching, silent refresh, and optional audit fan-out.

props.label: Client App
props.description: Browser or mobile app initiating the auth flow.

props.label: API Gateway
props.description: Edge service that terminates TLS and forwards auth traffic.

props.label: Auth Service
props.description: Validates credentials and issues sessions.

props.label: User Store
props.description: Primary credential and session metadata store.

props.label: POST /login
props.description: Client submits email + password to the public auth endpoint.

props.label: Credentials valid?
props.description: Split the flow based on password verification.

props.label: Valid
props.description: Lookup the user, mint the session, and return success.

props.label: Invalid
props.description: Return a rejected login response.

props.label: Validate credentials
props.description: Gateway forwards the request to the internal auth service.

props.label: SELECT user by email
props.description: Auth service fetches the user record and password hash.

props.label: User row + password hash
props.description: Database returns the stored credentials for verification.

props.label: Issue session cookie
props.description: Auth service signs the session and hands the cookie payload back to the edge.

props.label: 200 Set-Cookie
props.description: Gateway returns a successful response and closes the login transaction.

props.label: Rejected login
props.body: Do not reveal whether the email exists. Return a generic auth error and increment fraud signals.

props.label: 401 Invalid credentials
props.description: Public error response for invalid password or unknown user.

props.label: Session contract
props.body: The cookie stores a signed session id. Server-side state still lives in the primary store.

props.label: Refresh while session active
props.description: Silent refresh repeats on every protected page view.

props.label: POST /session/refresh
props.description: Client silently refreshes before the session expires.

props.label: 204 refreshed cookie
props.description: Gateway rotates the cookie and returns without reloading the page.

props.label: Audit suspicious logins
props.description: Only emit the audit event when the risk engine flags the request.

props.label: Emit suspicious-login audit event
props.description: Optional audit path that preserves the main login contract.

props.label: Audit fan-out
props.body: This optional step can later expand into a richer fraud-review sequence without changing the core login happy path.
